arts.ttl: Chris Wilder Discusses Oliver Arblaster Injury, Tom Davies Return And Coventry City’s Threat
arts.sum: As the Championship season moves into a critical phase, Sheffield United will restart their campaign with a visit to the CBS Arena to face Coventry City on Saturday afternoon. Coventry City enter the fixture buoyed by their dramatic 2-2 comeback against Sunderland. Down 2-0 at halftime, caretaker manager Rhys Carr inspired a remarkable turnaround, securing […] The post Chris Wilder Discusses Oliver Arblaster Injury, Tom Davies Return And Coventry City’s Threat appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder drops printed T-shirts quip as dynamic duo 'desperate' on first Coventry City return
arts.sum: Chris Wilder says Gustavo Hamer and Callum O’Hare are “desperate” to do well on their first playing returns to Coventry City – the club where they made their names in English football. Hamer, meanwhile, is sure to get a warm reception at the CBS Arena where supporters loved watching him play for three seasons before he was sold for £15m the summer before last, since when he's returned as a spectator on several occasions.

arts.ttl: Coventry City's 'statement performance' as new boss expected to take watching brief v Sheffield Utd
arts.sum: As for the players, they are keen to pick up from where they left off from their come-back second half display at leaders Sunderland last time out and put on a good show for themselves, the fans and interim boss Rhys Carr as well as Robins’ remaining coaching team, who face an uncertain future given that a new head coach is likely to want to bring in his own backroom staff. As for showing the new man what they’re all about, taking into account the fact that he’s almost certainly likely to be watching the televised game, the defender said: “Yes, one hundred percent.
International football is consigned to the memory bank for 2024 and there is a full slate of Championship action this weekend as Phil Agius previews all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Coventry City vs Sheffield United – Preview
arts.sum: As we head into the meatier part of the season, Sheffield United will kick things off away at Coventry City on Saturday afternoon, with a couple of familiar faces set to grace the pitch at the Coventry Building Society Arena. Before the Championship was interrupted by yet another international break, Coventry City were losing 2-0 […] The post Coventry City vs Sheffield United – Preview appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: What Doug King has told Coventry City's players about the appointment of their next head coach
arts.sum: Asked if he’d like to see an appointment sooner rather than later, the 24-year-old player, who has been away on international duty with Jamaica, said: “Of course you’d always like to have that clarification, knowing who is coming in and everything but at the same time the owner has spoken to us and he made it very clear that he wants to get this decision right and he’s going to take his time on the decision, so we knew that was going to be the case. He added: “He met with us just before the international break and made it clear that he wants to take his time and get it right because it is a big decision, so we will just wait and see who comes in.”
